treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 650 mg PO Q4H: PRN Pain - Mild

treatment_information.treatment_response: Helped kidneys and brought blood numbers back to where they usually are

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: included atorvastatin, benzonatate, docusate, gabapentin, keppra, insulin, imdur, donepezil, ASA, lisinopril, pantoprazole, sertraline

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented after a fall at home
Medications administered, including various medications for underlying conditions
Patient advised to follow-up with lung doctors about possible sleep apnea

patient_outcome.final_status: Confused, alert and interactive, requires assistance for ambulation
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with lung doctors about possible sleep apnea
patient_outcome.complications: Acute kidney injury, intermittent brief hypoxia
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
